description: ol-not-a-place (issue #156): the runtime's own guard for an infix-operator assignment target (`1 + 2 = 3` parses as a `Call` with callee `"+"`, prefix-shaped in the AST but written infix in source) reconciled to the FULL target surface text (`1 + 2`), matching the semantic checker's `not-a-place-nested-and-infix` fixture's `1 + 2` case and the same source-slicing rule (`not-a-place-text.ts`).
